title: Http_Favicon
description: Http_Favicon schema from Asset Graph API

hash_shodan.description: A hash expressed as a signed decimal integer, provided for compatability with Shodan search.

name.description: The URI used to retrieve the favicon, which most commonly use the http(s) or data schemes. URIs using the data scheme are truncated: the first 48 and last 24 characters are preserved.

size.description: The size of the favicon retrieved, in bytes.
